user.title: Scent Diffuser Setup
user.description: Choose how to connect your scent diffuser.

ble_scan.title: Select Bluetooth Device
ble_scan.description: Select your scent diffuser from the list of discovered devices. Bluetooth provides local control with no cloud account required. All features are available including fan control and real-time status updates.

cloud.title: Aroma-Link Cloud Login
cloud.description: Connect via the Aroma-Link cloud service. Requires an Aroma-Link account and internet connection. Only available for Aroma-Link diffusers (not ShinePick). Note: Fan control and real-time status updates are only available via Bluetooth.
